briefs.title: BC Parks camping fees rise and non-residents now pay an extra surcharge
briefs.summary: Effective January 30, 2026, BC Parks updated its recreation user fees. Day-use fees rose from a max of $35 to $51, and backcountry fees from a max of $10 to $25. A new surcharge of $5–$30 per use was added for anyone who is not a BC resident — covering campsites, cabins, group sites, and vessel use.
briefs.action_required: Update any guest-facing pricing materials or booking info to reflect the new BC Parks fee ranges and non-resident surcharge.

key_dates.label: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation changes take effect

briefs.industries: Hotel & Accommodation, Transportation & Logistics, Natural Resources
